2025-01-20

How Address Generators Work

Address generators work by combining data from various datasets. They use lists of real street names, city names, states, and valid ZIP code ranges. A random number generator selects entries from each dataset and combines them into a complete address. The best generators ensure that cities and ZIP codes actually match, creating realistic combinations. Phone numbers are generated using valid area codes for each state.
